scripts.dev: npm -w apps/api run dev & npm -w apps/web run dev & npm -w apps/webhooks run dev
scripts.build: npm -w apps/api run build && npm -w apps/webhooks run build && npm -w apps/web run build
scripts.lint: npm -w apps/api run lint --if-present && npm -w apps/webhooks run lint --if-present && npm -w apps/web run lint --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm -w apps/api run typecheck --if-present && npm -w apps/webhooks run typecheck --if-present && npm -w apps/web run typecheck --if-present
